message:
test(search-core): add 30 tests for auto_init, model2vec, and fastembed

Expand auto_init.rs from 2 to 18 tests covering:
- TwoTierAvailability: Debug all variants, Clone/Copy, PartialEq
  same/different variants, 4 distinct variants in set
- EmbedderInfo: Debug, Clone trait bound
- TwoTierContext: is_full/is_available consistency with availability(),
  config dimensions positive, create_index no-panic, Debug trait
- Convenience functions: is_two_tier_available and
  is_full_two_tier_available match context methods
- Embedder info accessors match availability state

Expand model2vec.rs from 6 to 20 tests covering:
- l2_normalize: zero vector, single element, already normalized,
  negative values
- tensor_to_embeddings: zero vocab, single element, size too large,
  size too small
- model_search_paths: 32M model, custom model name
- is_available: non-existent model returns false
- required_files: count is 2
- Global embedder: get/is_available no-panic

Expand fastembed.rs from 3 to 11 tests covering:
- l2_normalize: zero vector, single element, negative values,
  large 100-element vector
- Global embedder: get/is_available no-panic
- Constants: not empty, distinct

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
